title: Sweet and Tender Canadian Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A high heat one-pot dish featuring tender sweet potatoes in a low-fat-friendly sweet and savory sauce, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup low-sodium chicken or vegetable broth
2 tablespoons low-fat coconut milk (optional)
ingredients.notes: for creaminess, reduce to 1 tablespoon if using soy sauce for richness

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add cubed sweet potato to the hot pan, sprinkle with garlic and seasonings. Cook until tender, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Deglaze the pan with lime juice, then add soy sauce (and coconut milk if using) and low-sodium broth. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for another 5-7 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly and sweet potato is fully cooked.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course with steamed vegetables.
